text:
P0100H Physical Restraints in Chair: Other Restraint Chair Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that an other type of restraint in a chair was used. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily
559 V0100A_PRIOR_FED_OBRA_CD V0100A_PRIOR_FED_OBRA_CD V0100A Prior Assessment Federal OBRA Reason for Assessment Code CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the Federal OBRA Reason for Assessment of the most recent prior OBRA or Scheduled PPS
